title: 10 Signs the Phone Is Winning
caption:
You already know which of these is yours.

This generation's battle isn't new — every man has had a thing that owns him if he doesn't own it. But this one lives in your pocket, vibrates 80 times a day, and makes you feel connected while it isolates you.

None of these are judgments. They're diagnostics. If three of them are true for you, you don't need a productivity hack. You need to treat this like the fight it is.

"If by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live." — Romans 8:13. Not manage. Not detox. Put to death.

Which one goes first?

#faith #christianmen #phone #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #selfcontrol #christian #romans #realtalk
